A new adventure!

• January 11, 2023

I’m very glad to announce the release of my personal blog. I’ve been experimenting with a lot of the code and the incredible theme work done by TheLCARS.com and the incredible STAR TREK theme work they started. The website will continue to grow as I update it and as TheLCARS.com add new features to the themes that I will have to adapt with time. I’ve also had a fair bit of fun modifying it from the custom cascade in the header to the custom Stardate system.

I would love some more idea’s on features to add to it in the future. I also plan on making a seperate page for important updates for Star Trek Online which I play rather frequently and possibly a way to host a comment section. I’m not quite sure how to implement the comment section yet but it will be coming eventually. Until that time comes, you can contact me over on my Twitter account.

That will be all Ensign. Dismissed.
• Cpt. Keith Ashton
